title: Automatic Wire Cutter and Stripper Machine
description: Benchtop automatic machine using stepper-driven feed rollers and solenoid-actuated V-blades to cut and strip insulation from wires to programmable lengths at 300–600 wires/hour.
objective: Cut and strip AWG 20–28 wire; programmable strip length 5–50 mm; throughput ≥ 300 wires/hour; blade depth adjustable per wire gauge.
constraints: 12 V DC powered; Arduino Uno controller; BOM < ₹4000; manual gauge-selection cam.
supporting_fact_titles: Wire Cutting and Insulation Stripping — Blade Mechanics
design_element_titles: Automatic Wire Cutter and Stripper Mechanism

element_usage_notes.Automatic Wire Cutter and Stripper Mecha: Stepper feed roller + solenoid V-blades; 6-position depth cam for AWG 20–28.
element_usage_notes.NEMA17 Stepper + DRV8825 Microstepping D: 1/8 microstepping for ±1 mm strip length accuracy.
